title: Security Group Enumeration: Rapid Membership Queries
description: Detects Event 4799 rapid security group membership enumeration — indicates BloodHound/SharpHound or net group /domain reconnaissance.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and (('Event ID' = 4799)) | eval Account = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'SubjectUserName:([^;]+)'), Process = regexextract('Original Log Content', 'CallerProcessName:([^;]+)') | stats count as Queries by Account, Process, Entity | where Queries > 50 | sort -Queries
